rationale: All four scheduled tasks created on host-01 correspond to well-known, legitimate software: A0 registers the Npcap watchdog (\npcapwatchdog) pointing to the official Npcap CheckStatus.bat, EV-001 registers the Mozilla Firefox default browser agent under the Mozilla author field, and EV-002/EV-003 register Aurora-Agent (Nextron Systems) signature and program update tasks. The creating subjects are either the machine account (WORKGROUP\host-01-$) or the local Administrator, consistent with software installation activity. No suspicious command-line arguments, unusual paths, or obfuscation are present in any of the tasks.
